race.description: Dougherty Property Springboard Prelude Mdn Plate
race.comment: PROFIT IN PARADISE (3) as two months between runs when a tiring sixth over this distance at the Gold Coast last start. Sure to take a lot from that outing and from a nice draw should be prominent for a long way. MAGIC ALL AROUND (10) is a first starter from the Sally Taylor yard. Went well in a recent trial at Taree. Keep an eye on the betting. FLYING SCARLETT (16) can improve after a modest debut at the Gold Coast 15 days ago. Include. FIERCE FIRE (1) son of Fierce Impact from Miss Doubtfire on debut. Won his most recent trial at this track. Trained on the course and worth watching for any market confidence.
